array.string: IST_DATE="$(TZ=Asia/Kolkata date '+%Y-%m-%d')"; IST_HOUR="$(TZ=Asia/Kolkata date '+%H')"; STAMP_FILE="/Users/tamishra/.local/state/dlyPrb-autopush/last_run_ist_date"; if [ "$IST_HOUR" != "12" ]; then exit 0; fi; if [ -f "$STAMP_FILE" ] && [ "$(cat "$STAMP_FILE")" = "$IST_DATE" ]; then exit 0; fi; /usr/bin/osascript -e 'tell application "Terminal" to do script "/Users/tamishra/Documents/dlyPrb/scripts/auto-push-dlyprb.sh >> /tmp/dlyprb-autopush.out.log 2>> /tmp/dlyprb-autopush.err.log"'
